mapper.sql: id, workspace_id, stable_key, name, layer, parent_package_id, status, revision
mapper.select: SELECT FROM pdp_domain_package WHERE workspace_id = #{workspaceId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} ORDER BY stable_key, id
mapper.update: UPDATE pdp_domain_package SET name = #{name}, layer = #{layer}, parent_package_id = #{parentPackageId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, status = #{status}, revision = #{revision} WHERE id = #{id,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND revision = #{revision} - 1
